people_tenant_user_ux.name: people_tenant_user_ux
people_tenant_user_ux.where: "people"."user_id" is not null and "people"."deleted_at" is null

storage_object_deletion_outbox_lease_sta.name: storage_object_deletion_outbox_lease_state_ck
storage_object_deletion_outbox_lease_sta.value:
(
        ("storage_object_deletion_outbox"."status" = 'pending' AND "storage_object_deletion_outbox"."lease_id" IS NULL AND "storage_object_deletion_outbox"."claimed_at" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("storage_object_deletion_outbox"."status" = 'deleting' AND "storage_object_deletion_outbox"."lease_id" IS NOT NULL AND "storage_object_deletion_outbox"."claimed_at" IS NOT NULL)
      )

ai_conversation_shares_target_shape_ck.name: ai_conversation_shares_target_shape_ck
ai_conversation_shares_target_shape_ck.value:
("ai_conversation_shares"."target_type" = 'user' AND "ai_conversation_shares"."target_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ai_conversation_shares"."target_role_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("ai_conversation_shares"."target_type" = 'role' AND "ai_conversation_shares"."target_role_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ai_conversation_shares"."target_user_id" IS NULL)

training_class_attendees_completion_revi.name: training_class_attendees_completion_review_ck
training_class_attendees_completion_revi.value:
(
        "training_class_attendees"."completion_reviewed_at" IS NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_reviewed_by_tenant_user_id" IS NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_attended" IS NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_passed" IS NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_grade" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "training_class_attendees"."completion_reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_attended" IS NOT NULL
        AND "training_class_attendees"."completion_passed" IS NOT NULL
        AND ("training_class_attendees"."completion_attended" OR NOT "training_class_attendees"."completion_passed")
      )

training_records_active_class_person_ux.name: training_records_active_class_person_ux
training_records_active_class_person_ux.where: "training_records"."class_id" IS NOT NULL AND "training_records"."person_id" IS NOT NULL AND "training_records"."deleted_at" IS NULL

equipment_maintenance_dispatches_publish.name: equipment_maintenance_dispatches_publish_lease_state_ck
equipment_maintenance_dispatches_publish.value:
(
        ("equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."status" = 'queued' AND (
          ("equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NOT NULL AND "equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL)
        ))
        OR
        ("equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."status" <> 'queued' AND "equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "equipment_maintenance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
      )

ppe_inspections_submitted_result_ck.name: ppe_inspections_submitted_result_ck
ppe_inspections_submitted_result_ck.value: "ppe_inspections"."status" <> 'submitted' OR ("ppe_inspections"."result" IS NOT NULL AND "ppe_inspections"."inspected_on" IS NOT NULL)

inspection_bank_criteria_choice_options_.name: inspection_bank_criteria_choice_options_ck
inspection_bank_criteria_choice_options_.value:
(
        "inspection_bank_criteria"."response_type" = 'choice'
        AND jsonb_typeof("inspection_bank_criteria"."choice_options") = 'array'
        AND jsonb_array_length("inspection_bank_criteria"."choice_options") BETWEEN 2 AND 50
      ) OR (
        "inspection_bank_criteria"."response_type" <> 'choice'
        AND "inspection_bank_criteria"."choice_options" = '[]'::jsonb
      )

inspection_type_criteria_choice_options_.name: inspection_type_criteria_choice_options_ck
inspection_type_criteria_choice_options_.value:
(
        "inspection_type_criteria"."response_type" = 'choice'
        AND jsonb_typeof("inspection_type_criteria"."choice_options") = 'array'
        AND jsonb_array_length("inspection_type_criteria"."choice_options") BETWEEN 2 AND 50
      ) OR (
        "inspection_type_criteria"."response_type" <> 'choice'
        AND "inspection_type_criteria"."choice_options" = '[]'::jsonb
      )

inspection_record_criteria_response_shap.name: inspection_record_criteria_response_shape_ck
inspection_record_criteria_response_shap.value:
(
        "inspection_record_criteria"."response_type" = 'choice'
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."answer" IS NULL
        AND jsonb_typeof("inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot") = 'array'
        AND jsonb_array_length("inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot") BETWEEN 2 AND 50
        AND ("inspection_record_criteria"."choice_answer" IS NULL OR "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot" ? "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_answer")
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."text_answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."number_answer" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "inspection_record_criteria"."response_type" IN ('text', 'long_text')
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot" = '[]'::jsonb
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."number_answer" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "inspection_record_criteria"."response_type" = 'number'
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot" = '[]'::jsonb
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."text_answer" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "inspection_record_criteria"."response_type" IN ('pass_fail_na', 'rating', 'yes_no')
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_options_snapshot" = '[]'::jsonb
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."choice_answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."text_answer" IS NULL
        AND "inspection_record_criteria"."number_answer" IS NULL
      )

training_assessment_results_choice_optio.name: training_assessment_results_choice_options_snapshot_ck
training_assessment_results_choice_optio.value:
"training_assessment_results"."kind_snapshot" NOT IN ('single_choice', 'multi_choice')
        OR COALESCE(
          jsonb_typeof("training_assessment_results"."options_snapshot") = 'array'
          AND jsonb_array_length("training_assessment_results"."options_snapshot") BETWEEN 2 AND 50,
          false
        )

training_assessment_type_questions_choic.name: training_assessment_type_questions_choice_options_ck
training_assessment_type_questions_choic.value:
"training_assessment_type_questions"."kind" NOT IN ('single_choice', 'multi_choice')
        OR COALESCE(
          jsonb_typeof("training_assessment_type_questions"."options") = 'array'
          AND jsonb_array_length("training_assessment_type_questions"."options") BETWEEN 2 AND 50,
          false
        )

training_assessments_active_compliance_a.name: training_assessments_active_compliance_attempt_ux
training_assessments_active_compliance_a.where: "training_assessments"."compliance_obligation_id" is not null and "training_assessments"."status" = 'in_progress' and "training_assessments"."deleted_at" is null

training_enrollments_completion_review_c.name: training_enrollments_completion_review_ck
training_enrollments_completion_review_c.value:
(
        "training_enrollments"."completion_reviewed_at" IS NULL
        AND "training_enrollments"."completion_reviewed_by_tenant_user_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "training_enrollments"."completion_requested_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "training_enrollments"."completion_reviewed_at" IS NOT NULL
        AND "training_enrollments"."completion_reviewed_by_tenant_user_id" IS NOT NULL
      )

report_runs_publish_lease_state_ck.name: report_runs_publish_lease_state_ck
report_runs_publish_lease_state_ck.value:
(
        ("report_runs"."status" = 'queued' AND (
          ("report_runs"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "report_runs"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("report_runs"."publish_lease_id" IS NOT NULL AND "report_runs"."publish_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL)
        ))
        OR
        ("report_runs"."status" <> 'queued' AND "report_runs"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "report_runs"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
      )

report_schedules_date_bounds_ck.name: report_schedules_date_bounds_ck
report_schedules_date_bounds_ck.value: "report_schedules"."starts_on" is null or "report_schedules"."ends_on" is null or "report_schedules"."starts_on" <= "report_schedules"."ends_on"

compliance_dispatches_publish_lease_stat.name: compliance_dispatches_publish_lease_state_ck
compliance_dispatches_publish_lease_stat.value:
(
        ("compliance_dispatches"."status" = 'queued' AND (
          ("compliance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "compliance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
          OR
          ("compliance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NOT NULL AND "compliance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NOT NULL)
        ))
        OR
        ("compliance_dispatches"."status" <> 'queued' AND "compliance_dispatches"."publish_lease_id" IS NULL AND "compliance_dispatches"."publish_claimed_at" IS NULL)
      )

pdf_templates_subject_default_ux.name: pdf_templates_subject_default_ux
pdf_templates_subject_default_ux.where: "pdf_templates"."is_module_default" and "pdf_templates"."record_subject_type" is not null and "pdf_templates"."deleted_at" is null
